rows.label: qev013401_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oh! If it isn't [ST:playername ]! ...Though you
probably don't know me, do you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0002
rows.name:
I'm a BLADE too, just like you. I
belong to the Landbanker Union, so I
mostly handle resource surveying jobs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0078
rows.name:
So... how are things going for you?
I bet Colonel Elma's team has a lot
of difficult missions, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_JNK0010
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev013401_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell Sarona that you're doing all right.

rows.label: qev013401_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev013401_SEL0021
rows.name: Complain to Sarona about all your woes.

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0003
rows.name:
Looking at you, it seems like you
could handle any job thrown your
way flawlessly... Ah, I'm jealous.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0004
rows.name:
As for me, I was asked to survey a mountain
up north, and I'm currently struggling to
figure out how to conquer that tough spot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0005
rows.name:
Really!? Even someone like you
has slumps. I somehow feel a
sense of affinity for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0006
rows.name:
As for me, I was asked to survey a mountain
up north, and I'm currently struggling to
figure out how to conquer that tough spot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0007
rows.name:
I mean, it's a rugged mountain to
begin with, and there are strange
native creatures wandering around...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0008
rows.name:
And lately, aliens have been showing
up there a lot, haven't they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0009
rows.name:
Especially those reptile-like ones... Ma-non, was it? I
heard they use overly powerful weapons to indiscriminately
kill both native creatures and Earthlings, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_JNK0030
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev013401_SEL0031
rows.name:
Confirm that the Ma-non are
indeed crazed killers.

rows.label: qev013401_JNK0040
rows.name: Disagree

rows.label: qev013401_SEL0041
rows.name:
Scoff at Sarona's assertions
about the Ma-non.

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0010
rows.name:
Right, right! I've even heard rumors
that they're waiting for a chance to
use that spaceship to rule NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0011
rows.name:
No way!? My buddy says
they're all dangerous.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0012
rows.name:
He said if they got serious, they have the technology to
burn this city to the ground in seconds using that spaceship,
and they're just waiting for the right opportunity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0013
rows.name:
No matter how you think about it, going
alone into a demon realm where such
dangerous guys roam is impossible...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0014
rows.name:
Ah... If you're okay with
it, want to come with me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0015
rows.name:
Why not? Mountain climbing feels
great, you know? Let's traverse
the northern mountain together![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0016
rows.name:
See? I'll split the reward fifty-fifty,
so in exchange, if any aliens show
up, you exterminate them for me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0017
rows.name:
That helps so much. Yesterday, I even had a
dream where I was caught by a Ma-non and
used as material for human experiments...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0018
rows.name:
Truth be told, I was thinking
about just ditching this
request and running away...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_JNK0050
rows.name: Scold

rows.label: qev013401_SEL0051
rows.name:
Tell Sarona to take her
work more seriously.

rows.label: qev013401_JNK0060
rows.name: Console

rows.label: qev013401_SEL0061
rows.name: Sympathize with Sarona.

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0019
rows.name:
Whoa... Sorry! You're
a very serious BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0020
rows.name:
But I want to help everyone too.
I'm scared... but I still want
to do something about it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0021
rows.name:
You're quite easy to talk to!
We're not emotionless robots,
so we have times like that too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0022
rows.name:
But... even so, doing what
has to be done is our job.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0023
rows.name:
Well, thinking that you'll be coming with
me made me feel a whole lot better.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0024
rows.name:
Fufu, it's work, but it's still mountain climbing.
Let's breathe some good air, see some beautiful
scenery... and enjoy ourselves before coming back![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0025
rows.name:
...Yeah! Then first, let's meet up at the
mountain entrance... around the second fault
of Talon Rock. I'll go ahead, so come quickly![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0026
rows.name:
Ah, you're finally here! Did you
bring food properly? Are your
cold-weather gear and climbing tools OK?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0027
rows.name:
Landslides, falling rocks, and getting
lost... Mountains are sometimes more
terrifying than any native creature.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0083
rows.name:
Don't let your guard down just
because you're used to the place![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0084
rows.name: Assure

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0085
rows.name: Tell Sarona that you're all good to go.

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0086
rows.name: Boast

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0087
rows.name: Express how easy this will be for you.

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0090
rows.name:
Good honest answer! ...So, while I was
researching various things on the way
here, I already found something amazing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0047
rows.name:
Wha... Are you perhaps a mountain veteran!? I
thought I could at least lead the way in the
mountains since I can't help in combat...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0048
rows.name:
...Well, whatever. More importantly, while
I was researching various things on the
way here, I found something amazing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0066
rows.name:
Lionbone Bort and Foucaultium Ore...
These are pretty valuable materials
used for Dolls and weapons, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0067
rows.name:
If we had a few more samples, we
could probably measure their purity.
Want to gather them together?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0068
rows.name:
...Alright! Then let's meet
back here once we've both
gathered some of each, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0069
rows.name:
Be extremely careful of native
creatures... and aliens![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0074
rows.name:
It seems there isn't much Lionbone Bort
or Foucaultium Ore around here. You
should try looking further that way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0075
rows.name:
Ah... Be extremely careful of native
creatures and aliens, got it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0079
rows.name:
It's okay now, so calm down.
...Okay? If you cry, that
monster might notice us, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0080
rows.name: Y-Yes... But, are you sure...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0081
rows.name:
I'm a Ma-non, and... You said
we were dangerous aliens. And
yet you protected me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0082
rows.name:
Ah... well, don't worry about it!
That was just a figure of speech.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0028
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0029
rows.name: Ask Sarona what happened.

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0030
rows.name: Praise

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0031
rows.name: Tell Sarona you're proud of her.

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0034
rows.name: ...Ah! [ST:playername ]! You came at a good time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0035
rows.name:
We got attacked by a vicious Vasalt near
the bridge-like formation up ahead, so I
grabbed this child and escaped here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0038
rows.name: ...Ah! [ST:playername ]! You came at a good time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0040
rows.name:
Well, we made up, I guess... I mean, you
can't just abandon a girl in terrible
trouble, even if she is an alien, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0041
rows.name:
We got attacked by a vicious Vasalt
called a Block Vasalt near the
bridge-like formation up ahead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0044
rows.name:
Sorry to ask, but could you run
over there and defeat it for me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0045
rows.name:
I'll explain the details later. I'm
looking after this child right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0052
rows.name:
This child seems to be in a panic,
so I need to calm her down a bit...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0053
rows.name:
Please, go defeat the Block Vasalt!
It's the Vasalt wandering around the
bridge-like formation up ahead![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0088
rows.name:
We could hear the Block Vasalt's death
cry all the way over here. Looks like
we can safely reach the summit now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0089
rows.name:
...Hey, Inisae. You're going up
to gather materials too, right?
If you'd like, let's go together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0091
rows.name:
Eh... I'm very happy to be able
to talk with Sarona like this,
but... won't I be a burden?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0092
rows.name:
...Not at all! Consider it thanks
for the sweets you gave me earlier.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0054
rows.name: Oh right, [ST:playername ]! You try this chocolate too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0055
rows.name:
It seems to be a popular sweet
among the Ma-non recently,
and it's super delicious.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_JNK0110
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: qev013401_SEL0111
rows.name: Taste some of the Ma-non chocolate.

rows.label: qev013401_JNK0120
rows.name: Decline

rows.label: qev013401_SEL0121
rows.name:
Turn down the offer to
try the chocolate.

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0056
rows.name:
It has an exquisite bitterness mixed in
with the sweetness... Like... isn't it an
innovative sweet you can't taste in NLA?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0039
rows.name: ...See? It's pretty good, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0057
rows.name:
Ehhh! But it's super delicious! It has an
exquisite bitterness mixed in with the
sweetness... It's a very innovative flavor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0058
rows.name:
Seriously... you don't need to be
afraid just because it's Ma-non
food. Are you perhaps a bit timid?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0059
rows.name:
Fufu, delicious... ...Ah, by the
way, what is this sweet made of?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0060
rows.name:
It's compressed Vasalt viscera!
It's very highly nutritious
and good for your body.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0061
rows.name:
Pffffft!! Ugh... Inisae... You
should have said that first...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0062
rows.name:
Eh... was there a problem? Vasalts are dangerous
native creatures, but if you cook and eat them,
they cause no harm to the body, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0063
rows.name:
Umm... well, you gave it to me out of
goodwill. ...It's nothing, I'm fine.
Anyway, let's head to the summit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0064
rows.name:
...Ah, we'll be heading ahead while
engaging in cross-cultural exchange,
so [ST:playername ], you follow along quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0065
rows.name: Guh... Uuugh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0093
rows.name: ...You're... ah...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0094
rows.name:
Where's Inisae!? Hey,
didn't you see her!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_JNK0130
rows.name: Inform

rows.label: qev013401_SEL0131
rows.name: Tell Sarona you haven't seen Inisae.

rows.label: qev013401_JNK0140
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: qev013401_SEL0141
rows.name: Ask Sarona what happened.

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0095
rows.name:
No way... Then, was she taken away
by that monster just like that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0096
rows.name:
Sorry, I panicked... I'm
glad you're staying calm.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0097
rows.name:
It seems this place was the territory
of a blatta called the Abyssal Blatta.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0098
rows.name:
While we were mining for materials, it
got angry and suddenly charged at us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0099
rows.name:
And then Inisae shoved me out
of the way... She saved me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0100
rows.name:
She disappeared into the cave
up ahead just like that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0101
rows.name: ...Please! Help me look for her![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013401_MSG0102
rows.name:
How should I say this... We
haven't known each other long,
but she's... my precious friend.[ST:wait ]
